channel.title: Your Name — Blog
channel.description: Build logs, competition notes, and project deep-dives.

item.title: Qualifying for GSEF with Field-Scale Frost & Drought Forecasting
item.description: How I qualified for the Georgia Science and Engineering Fair from my county fair with a high-resolution ML system for frost and drought prediction, and how I plan to refine it.

item.title: MIT Zero Robotics: Galactic Greenhouse — How We Became Finalists
item.description: A quick story about our strategy, what we learned, and what made Galactic Greenhouse fun (and hard).
